posts.text: Don’t fall for the rage bait division online, learn how to have real conversations with people you don’t always agree with. Appreciate you having me on, @billmaher.

Catch me on @HBO with @billmaher TONIGHT!


Real Time with Bill Maher (@RealTimers)

FRIDAY: @BillMaher welcomes @TristanHarris, @RepLuna (@realannapaulina) + @PaulBegala to Real Time @HBO! 

Reply with a question and join the conversation after the show on #RTOvertime.





— https://nitter.net/RealTimers/status/2034423249124426172#m

Politico Europe is a mouthpiece for the pro-war machine in Ukraine. They have no access to the White House or to any information regarding internal discussions or peace talks with Russia. Please disregard their attempts to increase tensions between Russia and the United States. They are full of 💩, and this is not the first time we’ve caught them trying to orchestrate smear campaigns on behalf of war pimps in Europe.

This little guy doesn’t like the peace talks coming out of the WH. Good thing he will continue to maintain his mediocracy.


Michael Weiss (@michaeldweiss)

They don't come dumber than this.



— https://nitter.net/michaeldweiss/status/2035064759117025282#m

The numbers don’t lie. Voter ID is the most popular legislation in DECADES.


CBS News (@CBSNews)

CBS NEWS POLL: Requiring photo ID to vote and proving citizenship to register both find wide and often bipartisan support among Americans, while most also say voting by mail is OK. cbsn.ws/4lDMuR0











— https://nitter.net/CBSNews/status/2035050265749901436#m
The 2024 Olympic opening ceremony was completely sacrilegious. In 2028, things are about to change.
I am seriously DISGUSTED by some members of the Senate. Primary every single one of them

The Senate is now trying to run cover for the fact that they’ve been getting escorts through TSA while holding up TSA PAY AND LYING TO THE AMERICAN PEOLE ABOUT THEIR SHOW DEBATE ON VOTER ID. Cornyn just put out a statement saying his bill passed to stop escorts through the airports, but the SENATE IS STILL SITTING ON THEIR HANDS.
.@LeaderJohnThune why would you even consider sending the Senate on break? You guys can’t even get an 80/20 issue passed. Embrace the talking filibuster and stop the political tap dancing.
Peace talks with Russia are still very much alive and there is no indication they are helping Iran. Anyone saying otherwise is lying.

The victims did not agree with this statement…


ABC News (@ABC)

In his opening statement to the House Oversight Committee, Jeffrey Epstein's longtime attorney Darren Indyke claimed that he had "no knowledge whatsoever" of the late financier's crimes and categorically denied facilitating the sex trafficking of women. abcnews.link/QT44usp




— https://nitter.net/ABC/status/2034702866242273367#m

This is a big fish.


Marc Caputo (@MarcACaputo)

NEWS: James Comey has been subpoenaed in the wide-ranging "grand conspiracy" case against those who had investigated & prosecuted Trump from 2017-2024, @axios sources say

More than 130 subpoenas have been issued by the Southern District of FL

axios.com/2026/03/19/comey-s…




— https://nitter.net/MarcACaputo/status/2034711813237924093#m

So many people tried to pull @POTUS into a war with Russia via Ukraine and instead he is choosing peace. Let this be known, there is a ton of disinformation flying around right now. Peace must prevail.


CSPAN (@cspan)

.@RepScottPerry: "Was Russia an imminent threat to the United States when they went into Ukraine?"
 
Acting NSA Dir. Lt. Gen. William Hartman: "I don't think it was in the best interest of the United States for Russia to invade."
